description: Create a two-column contents slide for a monthly macro brief, with document overview and related briefs on the left and a numbered contents list on the right.

items.text: The monthly brief is intended to inform executive teams, boards and investors on the state of the economy. It has been prepared based on data as of December 10, 2025.
Each brief includes a summary of global business-relevant macroeconomic developments, and a set of indicators that track the overall health of the economy, business activity and consumers.
Read our latest point of views:
items.sub: October Macro Brief — Navigating two-speed economies; Steering through activist investor demands; Resilience Redefined; September Macro Brief — Special edition: Tariff update

items.text: See our recent monthly macro briefs:
items.sub: October: Navigating two-speed economies; September: Tariff update; July: Fiscal power plays; June: Immigration at a crossroads; May: Consumer spending in flux

items.text: For more information about Macro Foresight, visit www.accenture.com/macroforesight.
